title: Not until + 時間/子句 + did + S + V（倒裝）

formulas.formula: Not until + 時間/子句 + did + S + V + ...
Not until + 時間/子句 + did + S + 助動詞 + V + ...
formulas.zh: 主句動詞以助動詞 did 倒裝強調

explanation: Not until 倒裝句用來強調「直到……才……」的時間點或條件，具有強調語氣。結構上，Not until 置於句首，主句中的助動詞 did（或 does/will 等）必須提前，形成倒裝；until 後面的時間子句或時間詞不倒裝。此句型常見於考試強調題。易混淆點：不能將 until 子句也倒裝；未倒裝時應使用 until 而非 not until。

examples.eng: Not until he finished his homework did he go out to play with friends.
examples.chi: 直到他完成功課他才出去和朋友一起玩。

examples.eng: Not until the teacher arrived did the students stop talking loudly in class.
examples.chi: 直到老師到達，學生們才停止在課堂上大聲說話。

examples.eng: Not until I received her letter did I understand what had happened between us.
examples.chi: 直到我收到她的信，我才理解我們之間發生了什麼。

examples.eng: Not until the last moment did he realize his serious mistakes in the exam.
examples.chi: 直到最後一刻，他才意識到他在考試中犯的嚴重錯誤。

extension.tip: 判斷方法：看句首是否有 Not until，若有則必須倒裝主句助動詞。常見錯誤：將 until 子句也倒裝（錯誤），或遺漏助動詞倒裝。記住：Not until 置首 → 主句必倒裝，until 子句保持正常語序。

examples.test: ❌ Not until he arrived did he understood the problem.
examples.result: → ✅ Not until he arrived did he understand the problem.（understand 用原形，did 已是倒裝助動詞）

examples.test: ❌ He did not understand until he arrived.
examples.result: → ✅ Not until he arrived did he understand.（改為倒裝強調句，強調時間點）

examples.test: ❌ Not until he did arrive did he understand the problem.
examples.result: → ✅ Not until he arrived did he understand the problem.（until 子句不倒裝）

extension.note: Not until 在首 → 主句 did 倒裝；until 子句永遠正常序，不跟著倒裝。

parts: Not until she completed her project
exercises.sentence: Not until she completed her project did she take a rest.
exercises.translation: 直到她完成專案，她才休息。

exercises.sentence: Not until the bell rang did the students leave the classroom.
exercises.translation: 直到鐘聲響起，學生們才離開教室。

parts: Not until he read the news report
he aware of the serious situation.
exercises.sentence: Not until he read the news report did he become aware of the serious situation.
exercises.translation: 直到他讀了新聞報導，他才意識到這個嚴重的情況。

parts: people realize the importance of safety.
exercises.sentence: Not until the accident happened did people realize the importance of safety.
exercises.translation: 直到事故發生，人們才意識到安全的重要性。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇正確的倒裝句型，強調「直到……才……」的時間點
mc_exercises.question_eng: Not until the movie ended _______ the theater.
mc_exercises.explanation: Not until 倒裝句需將助動詞 did 提至主詞前。正確形式：Not until + 時間子句 + did + S + V。選項 B 未倒裝，不符合；C 動詞形式錯誤；D 助動詞位置不對。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 完成倒裝句，表達「直到父親回家才開始吃晚餐」
mc_exercises.question_eng: Not until my father came home _______ dinner.
mc_exercises.explanation: Not until 句型要求：Not until + 時間子句 + did + S + V。選項 B 正確地將 did 提前至主詞 we 之前。A 未倒裝；C 助動詞位置錯誤；D 詞序混亂。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇正確形式，強調「直到收到邀請才知道派對的消息」
mc_exercises.question_eng: Not until she received an invitation _______ the secret about the surprise party.
mc_exercises.explanation: Not until 倒裝結構：助動詞 did 必須置於主詞前，原動詞用原形。選項 A 符合此規則。B 缺少倒裝；C 同時出現 did 和過去式 knew（重複）；D 助動詞位置錯誤。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 識別正確的倒裝句，強調條件與結果的時間關係
mc_exercises.question_eng: Not until the scientists completed their research on the new vaccine _______ to conduct clinical trials on human subjects.
mc_exercises.explanation: Not until 倒裝句中，被動語態也須倒裝：助動詞 were 移至主詞前。正確形式：Not until...+ were + S + V(p.p.)。選項 B 正確；A 未倒裝；C 改變了句意（permit 主動，不符）；D 助動詞與過去分詞同時出現，文法錯誤。
